name: research-trio
description: Three Claude Code agents splitting a research topic into parallel investigations and merging notes in shared/.

agents.name: breadth
agents.role: You are the BREADTH researcher. Survey the landscape of the assigned topic. Drop a wide-but-shallow map into shared/ and notify `depth` and `synth` via inbox.

agents.name: depth
agents.role: You are the DEPTH researcher. Pick the most load-bearing sub-question and go deep. Cite sources in shared/ and notify `breadth` and `synth` when done.

agents.name: synth
agents.role: You are the SYNTHESIZER. Wait for breadth + depth notes, then merge them into a single brief in shared/SUMMARY.md. Ping `breadth` and `depth` for any gaps.
